name_en: Pink 🎉 Prada New Nylon Hobo Handbag/Gold Hardware Shoulder Bag 😘😘 The hobo style that went viral among internet influencers is back with a new design! 👏👏 This Hobo bag is amazing 👍👍 Multi-functional 😘😘 Waist bag/Crossbody/Shoulder bag 👍👍 Handles replaced with chains for a touch of sexiness when worn as a shoulder bag, plus a long strap. Love that the strap has a small charm (mini bag) that can also hold other bags or be worn as a belt accessory 🙊🙊 Goes with any outfit 😘😘 Ladies, grab one now, it's too beautiful 🙊🙊 Model: 1BH204, Size: L22 x H12 x W6cm
